caption: A man wearing a tall, spiky grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. In front of him is a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and a white shelving unit. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "PODCAST" appears on the left side of the frame, alongside a red and white graphic that reads "GOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while appearing to speak. The lighting remains consistent, and the surrounding equipment and decorations stay stationary, focusing the action on the man's subtle movements as he interacts with someone off-screen.
